reviews.comment:
Impecable la atención de los playeros, encargado y de su Gerente Daniel Ferreyra que con su amabilidad y experiencia, pudo solucionar un inconveniente que me permitió continuar mi viaje a la provincia de Córdoba. Los baños siempre son algo para destacar, por su cuidado y limpieza.

(Translated by Google)
The service from the beach attendants, the manager, and Daniel Ferreyra was impeccable. His kindness and experience helped resolve a problem that allowed me to continue my trip to the province of Córdoba. The restrooms are always noteworthy for their cleanliness and upkeep.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias nestor x el comentario saludos

I've never seen such slowness; 5 cars and it took 30 minutes to load. What they're doing is inexplicable.
